introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: At HResume, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our resume builder service.

personalData.title: Personal Information
personalData.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you choose to include in your resume.

usageData.title: Usage Data
usageData.content: We automatically collect certain information about your device and how you interact with our service, including IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on pages.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage patterns, and assist in our marketing efforts.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
points: To provide, maintain, and improve our resume builder service
To process your requests and transactions
To send you technical notices, updates, and support messages
To respond to your comments, questions, and requests
To monitor and analyze trends, usage, and activities
To detect, prevent, and address technical issues and security threats

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.intro: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:
circumstances: To comply with legal obligations or respond to legal requests
To protect our rights, privacy, safety, or property
With service providers who assist us in operating our platform (under strict confidentiality agreements)

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
rights: Access and receive a copy of your personal data
Request deletion of your personal data
Object to processing of your personal data
Data portability (receive your data in a structured format)

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us at:

changes.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the 'Last updated' date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our resume builder service
faq.noQuestions: No questions available at the moment.

contact.title: Still have questions?
contact.content: If you can't find the answer you're looking for, feel free to reach out to our support team.

questions.question: Is HResume really free?
questions.answer: Yes! HResume is completely free to use. There are no hidden fees, no subscriptions, and no credit card required. You can create, edit, and download as many resumes as you want without any cost.

questions.question: How do I create a resume?
questions.answer: Creating a resume is easy! Simply sign up for a free account, choose a professional template, and start filling in your information. You can add your work experience, education, skills, and more. The interface is intuitive and guides you through each step.

questions.question: Can I download my resume as a PDF?
questions.answer: Absolutely! Once you've completed your resume, you can download it as a high-quality PDF file. The PDF is formatted professionally and ready to share with employers or upload to job boards.

questions.question: Are the resume templates ATS-friendly?
questions.answer: Yes, our resume templates are designed to be ATS (Applicant Tracking System) friendly. This means they are optimized to be easily read and parsed by automated recruitment systems, increasing your chances of getting noticed by employers.

questions.question: Can I edit my resume after creating it?
questions.answer: Yes, you can edit your resume at any time. Simply log in to your account, select the resume you want to edit, and make your changes. All your data is saved automatically, so you can update your resume whenever needed.

questions.question: How do I share my resume with others?
questions.answer: You can share your resume in two ways: 1) Download the PDF and send it via email or messaging apps, or 2) Use our secure sharing feature to generate a temporary link that you can share with recruiters or employers. The link can be set to expire after a specified number of days for added security.

questions.question: Is my data secure?
questions.answer: We take your privacy and data security seriously. Your personal information is encrypted and stored securely. We never share your data with third parties, and you can delete your account and all associated data at any time. For more details, please review our Privacy Policy.

questions.question: Can I create multiple resumes?
questions.answer: Yes! You can create as many resumes as you need. This is especially useful if you're applying for different types of jobs and want to tailor your resume for each position. Each resume is saved separately in your account.

questions.question: What languages are supported?
questions.answer: Currently, HResume supports English and French. You can switch between languages at any time, and all interface elements, including section labels and buttons, will be translated accordingly.

questions.question: Do I need to create an account?
questions.answer: Yes, creating a free account is required to save and manage your resumes. However, the registration process is quick and simple - just provide your name, email, and create a password. No credit card or payment information is needed.

questions.question: Can recruiters use HResume?
questions.answer: Yes! HResume offers a dedicated Recruiter Hub where recruiters can browse resumes, use advanced filters, share secure links with hiring managers, and collaborate with their team. Recruiters can also submit template proposals for approval.

questions.question: What if I need help or have a question?
questions.answer: If you need assistance, you can reach out to our support team at contact@hresume.pro. We're here to help and typically respond within 24-48 hours. You can also check this FAQ page for answers to common questions.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or need help? We're here to assist you. Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

info.title: Get in Touch

coverLetter.metaDescription: Create professional cover letters online with HResume. Match your resume, edit with templates, and export PDF. Free account to get started.
coverLetter.title: Cover letter builder that matches your resume
coverLetter.subtitle: Draft, edit, and save cover letters alongside your CV—then export a polished PDF when you're ready to apply.
coverLetter.accountNote: A free HResume account is required to create and save cover letters.
coverLetter.featuresTitle: Why use HResume for cover letters
bullets: Dedicated cover letter editor linked to your account
Save multiple letters for different roles
Same login as your resume and work certificates
bodyParagraphs: Recruiters often read your cover letter right after your CV. HResume keeps both documents in one workspace so your tone and details stay consistent.
Whether you're applying in English or French, you can manage letters from your dashboard and update them as often as you need.

workCertificate.metaDescription: Generate employment work certificates (attestation de travail) online. Fill in employer details, preview, and download PDF with HResume. Free account required.
workCertificate.title: Employment certificate generator
workCertificate.subtitle: Create official-style work certificates (employment attestations) for HR records, visa files, or job applications—preview and download PDF.
workCertificate.accountNote: A free HResume account is required to create and save work certificates.
bullets: Structured form for employer, employee, and dates
PDF export ready to print or email
Stored in your account next to resumes and cover letters
bodyParagraphs: A work certificate (certificate of employment / attestation de travail) confirms your role, dates, and employer. HResume helps you produce a clear document without starting from a blank Word file.
This tool is for employment attestations—not course certificates listed on your CV. For diplomas and training, use the Certificates section inside the resume editor.

coverLetter.title: My Cover Letters
coverLetter.subtitle: Create and manage your professional cover letters
coverLetter.noLettersDesc: Create your first professional cover letter to accompany your resume

software_engineer.subject: Application for [Position Name] - [Your Name]
software_engineer.text:
Dear [Hiring Manager Name],

I am writing to express my strong interest in the [Position Name] role at [Company Name]. With a solid background in full-stack development and a passion for building scalable applications, I am confident that my skills in [Tech Stack] make me an ideal candidate for your team.

At my previous role at [Previous Company], I led the development of a [Project Name] that resulted in a [Percentage]% increase in system performance. I enjoy tackling complex architectural challenges and am a firm believer in clean, maintainable code.

I have followed [Company Name]’s recent work on [Specific Project] and am impressed by your commitment to innovation. I am eager to bring my technical expertise to help [Company Name] achieve its goals.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how my background can contribute to your team.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

digital_marketing.subject: Application for Digital Marketing Specialist - [Your Name]
digital_marketing.text:
Dear [Hiring Manager Name],

I am excited to submit my application for the Digital Marketing Specialist position at [Company Name]. As a data-driven marketer with experience in managing multi-channel campaigns, I have a proven track record of increasing brand visibility and driving measurable ROI.

In my most recent position at [Previous Company], I spearheaded a strategy that doubled our engagement rate within six months. I am proficient in SEO, SEM, and performance analytics, and I pride myself on my ability to translate complex data into actionable insights.

[Company Name]’s reputation for [Specific Value] resonates deeply with my professional philosophy. I am eager to leverage my strategic mindset to reach new audiences and strengthen [Company Name]’s market position.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my expertise in digital strategy can help [Company Name] reach its ambitious growth targets.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

customer_success.subject: Application for Customer Success Manager - [Your Name]
customer_success.text:
Dear [Hiring Manager Name],

I was thrilled to see the opening for a Customer Success Manager at [Company Name]. With a background in client-facing roles and a deep-seated passion for ensuring user satisfaction, I am eager to help [Company Name]’s clients achieve their fullest potential.

Throughout my career at [Previous Company], I maintained a high client retention rate and successfully onboarded numerous enterprise accounts. I believe that true customer success comes from proactive communication and a thorough understanding of the client’s unique business needs.

I have been a long-time admirer of [Company Name]’s approach to [Specific Feature], and I am confident that my ability to build strong, lasting relationships will be a valuable asset to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
